# Basic MCP Echo Server Test
# Tests server startup, initialization, and basic protocol handling

# Build the echo server binary
go build -o mcp-echo-server .

# Test basic MCP protocol initialization
exec mcp-echo-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/list","params":{},"id":2}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"ping","params":{},"id":3}
EOF

# Verify server information in initialization response
stdout '"name":"echo-server"'
stdout '"version":"1.0.0"'

# Verify capabilities are reported
stdout '"tools"'

# Verify echo tool is listed
stdout '"name":"echo"'
stdout '"description":"Echoes back the provided message along with a timestamp"'

# Verify ping response
stdout '"result":"pong"'
